scripts.test:e2e: set -a && source ../../.env 2>/dev/null && set +a && bunx playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:ui: set -a && source ../../.env 2>/dev/null && set +a && bunx playwright test --ui
scripts.test:e2e:headed: set -a && source ../../.env 2>/dev/null && set +a && bunx playwright test --headed
scripts.test:e2e:debug: set -a && source ../../.env 2>/dev/null && set +a && bunx playwright test --debug
